model_role_note: rollout agents constrained to the skill text only; judge agents blind to skill version, scoring against the ground-truth fact sheet.
ground_truth_source: Journal-of-the-American-Academy-of-Religion-Skills/resources/official-source-map.md (OUP Information to Authors, Why-Publish, Book Reviewer Guidelines, JAAR Style Sheet, accessed 2026-06)
static_scorecard_note: scorecard rated the JAAR pack 94.0/100 while the submission skill omitted the verified decision timeline, rejection rate, grad-student review policy, and OA option.

missed_needs: Decision timeline (avg 106 days first decision; up to 6 months final) deflected to 'verify on page'
Grad-student-specific book-review policy missed (JAAR does not publish reviews from graduate students; commissioned only)
Open-access option (optional OA license + OUP Read & Publish) and 'no submission fee' not surfaced

edits.summary: Add the verified decision timeline (avg ~106 days to first decision, 2022; up to ~6 months final) and ~90% rejection rate; surface the no-submission-fee + optional-OA-license (Read & Publish) facts; add a hedged CMOS pointer for issues the JAAR style sheet does not cover; strengthen the book-review anti-pattern to state JAAR does not publish reviews from graduate students and commissions via the Book Review Editor.
edits.grounded_in: official-source-map.md (OUP Why-Publish, Information to Authors, Book Reviewer Guidelines, Style Sheet)
edits.gate_reason: strict improvement 61 -> 100 on held-out Q1-Q3; four verified facts added, volatile items (CMOS edition, OA APC) correctly left as live-check

result: jaar-submission held-out behavioral score 61 -> 100 (+39). Static scorecard unchanged (~94).
